docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2015 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-08-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KEI, JENNY AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-06-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 81.15 SERVED MAR-04-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEI, JENNY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (NOTE: 6/6/15 HEARING DATE REQUESTED BY DEFT IS A SATURDAY) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY L. ROBINSON--EMPLOYEE. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
